module:
Integration tests for capability negotiation between subsystems.

These tests verify that capability negotiation properly handles various scenarios
including compatible capabilities, partial matches, and empty capability sets.

__init__.docstring: Constructor that accepts arguments to be compatible with Registry.create

test_compatible_capability_negotiation.docstring: Test negotiation where all requested capabilities are supported.

test_partial_capability_match.docstring: Test negotiation where only some requested capabilities are supported.

test_empty_capability_set_handling.docstring: Test handling of empty capability sets.

test_capability_validation.docstring: Test capability validation with various required keys.

test_linguistic_capability_negotiation.docstring: Test capability negotiation in linguistic consumer.

test_boundary_provider_negotiation.docstring: Test capability negotiation in boundary provider.

test_fallback_capabilities.docstring: Test that fallback capabilities are provided when negotiation fails.

test_capability_error_messages.docstring: Test that capability negotiation errors are descriptive.
